error.title: Error
error.dm_failed_description: I couldn't DM you. Please enable DMs to receive command errors privately.

help.title: 📚 {module} Commands
help.no_module_desc: Use `/help` without arguments to see available modules.

serverinfo.error_description: This command only works inside a server.

setup.success_description: Guild settings have been updated successfully.
setup.error_guild_only: This command can only be used in a server.
setup.error_config_load: Could not load guild configuration. Please try again.
setup.error_save: Could not save guild configuration. Please try again.

config_missing.title: Not Configured
config_missing.description: The ticket category channel has not been configured. An admin must run `/setup` to set a ticket category, or use `/create_category` to create one. You can also configure it on the dashboard: https://nebulosabot-dashboard.vercel.app

modal.title: Open Ticket — {category}
modal.description_placeholder: Provide more details about your issue...
modal.empty_title_description: Please enter a title for your ticket.

panel.server_only_description: The ticket panel can only be deployed in a server.
panel.no_categories_description: No ticket categories are configured. Ask an admin to set them up with `/create_category`.
panel.success_description: The ticket panel has been deployed successfully.
panel.deploy_error_description: The panel was sent but the IDs could not be saved. It will not survive a bot restart.
panel.permission_denied_description: I don't have permission to send messages here.

create.server_only_description: Ticket categories can only be created in a server.
create.duplicate_description: A ticket category named **{name}** already exists in this server.
create.check_failed_description: Could not verify category uniqueness. Please try again.
create.failed_description: Could not create the ticket category. Please try again.
create.success_description:
Ticket category **{name}** has been created.
ID: `{id}`

list.failed_description: Could not retrieve ticket categories. Please try again.
list.empty_description: No ticket categories have been created yet. Use `/create_category` to add one.
list.title: 📋 Ticket Categories

delete.failed_description: Could not verify the category. Please try again.
delete.not_found_description: No ticket category found with ID `{id}`.
delete.wrong_guild_description: That category belongs to a different server.
delete.in_use_description: Cannot delete category **{name}** because it has **{count}** open ticket(s).

open.server_only_description: Tickets can only be opened in a server.
open.no_categories_description: No ticket categories are configured. Ask an admin to set them up with `/create_category`.
open.invalid_category_description: The configured Discord category for tickets no longer exists.
open.permission_denied_description: I don't have permission to create channels in the ticket category.
open.channel_failed_description: Could not create the ticket channel. Please try again.
open.creation_failed_description: Could not create the ticket. Please try again.
open.welcome_description:
Welcome! A staff member will assist you soon.
Describe your issue and a moderator will respond.
open.welcome_claimed_description: A staff member has claimed this ticket and will assist you shortly.

actions.claim_failed_description: Could not claim the ticket. Please try again.
actions.claim_not_ticket_description: This channel is not an active ticket channel.
actions.claim_already_claimed_description: This ticket is already claimed by <@{user}>.
actions.claim_generic_error_description: Could not claim the ticket. Please try again.
actions.close_not_ticket_description: This channel is not an active ticket channel.
actions.close_author_or_mod_description: Only the ticket author or a moderator can close this ticket.
actions.close_db_error_description: Could not close the ticket in the database.

subticket.help_description: Use `/subticket create` to create a sub-ticket from the current ticket channel.
subticket.server_only_description: Sub-tickets can only be created in a server.
subticket.owner_not_found_description: The parent ticket has no recorded author.
subticket.owner_not_found_resolve_description: Could not resolve the parent ticket owner. Please verify the parent ticket author is still in this server.
subticket.not_ticket_description: This command must be used in an open ticket channel.
subticket.lookup_failed_description: Could not look up the parent ticket. Please try again.
subticket.invalid_category_description: The configured Discord category for tickets no longer exists.
subticket.number_failed_description: Could not determine the next ticket number. Please try again.
subticket.channel_failed_description: Could not create the sub-ticket channel.
subticket.creation_failed_description: Could not create the sub-ticket. Please try again.

reopen.server_only_description: Tickets can only be reopened in a server.
reopen.invalid_ref_description: Could not parse `{ref}`. Use `#0003`, `0003`, or a UUID (optionally with a `ticket:` prefix).
reopen.lookup_failed_description: Could not look up the ticket. Please try again.
reopen.not_found_description: No ticket #{number} found in this server.
reopen.wrong_guild_description: That ticket belongs to a different server.
reopen.not_ticket_description: This command must be used in a ticket channel.
reopen.failed_description: Could not reopen the ticket. Please try again.
reopen.not_closed_description: Only closed tickets can be reopened. Current status: {status}
reopen.success_description: The ticket has been reopened in a new channel.

transfer.server_only_description: Tickets can only be transferred in a server.
transfer.not_ticket_description: This command must be used in a ticket channel.
transfer.lookup_failed_description: Could not look up the ticket. Please try again.
transfer.failed_description: Could not transfer the ticket. Please try again.
transfer.success_description: The ticket has been transferred to {member}.

note.add_lookup_failed_description: Could not look up the ticket. Please try again.
note.add_not_ticket_description: This command must be used in a ticket channel.
note.add_failed_description: Could not add the note. Please try again.
note.add_success_description: Note `{id}` has been added to the ticket.
note.list_dm_failed_description: Could not send the notes to your DMs. Please enable DMs from server members.
note.list_sent_description: Staff notes were sent to your DMs.
note.delete_lookup_failed_description: Could not look up the ticket. Please try again.
note.delete_not_ticket_description: This command must be used in a ticket channel.

banana.title: 🍌 Banana
banana.error_description: The banana image asset is not available. Please contact the bot owner.

validate.role_hierarchy_description: I cannot {action} {mention} — their highest role is above or equal to mine.

error.permission_denied_description: I don't have permission to {action} {mention}. Check my role position and server permissions.
error.action_failed_description: Failed to {action} {mention}. Discord returned an error.
error.unexpected_description: An unexpected error occurred while trying to {action} {mention}.

warn.failed_description: Could not record the warning. Please try again.
warn.auto_mute_description: ⚠️ {mention} has been **automatically muted** for 1 hour ({threshold} warnings).
warn.auto_mute_failed_description: ⚠️ Auto-mute failed — I lack permission to timeout {mention}.
warn.auto_kick_failed_description: ⚠️ Auto-kick failed — I lack permission to kick {mention}.

unwarn.failed_description: Could not remove the warning. Please try again.
unwarn.no_warnings_description: {mention} has no active warnings to remove.
unwarn.success_description: Removed the most recent warning from {mention}.

lock.permission_denied_description: I don't have permission to lock {channel}. Check my role permissions.
lock.success_description: {channel} has been locked. @everyone can no longer send messages.

unlock.permission_denied_description: I don't have permission to unlock {channel}. Check my role permissions.
unlock.success_description: {channel} has been unlocked. @everyone can send messages again.

modlogs.failed_description: Could not retrieve moderation history. Please try again.
modlogs.no_modlogs_description_filtered: {mention} has no moderation history matching the filters.
modlogs.title: 📋 Modlogs for {name}

daily.failed_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
daily.cooldown_description:
You already claimed your daily reward.
Current streak: **{streak}** — you can claim again in **{remaining}**.

coins.failed_description: Could not retrieve coin balance. Please try again.

leaderboard.error_description: Could not load the leaderboard. Please try again later.
leaderboard.empty_description: No members with {type} in this server yet. Start chatting to earn!

rank.failed_description: Could not retrieve rank data. Please try again later.
rank.no_data_description:
**{name}** has no stats yet.
Start chatting to earn XP and level up!

greetings.permission_denied_description: You need Administrator permission to use this command.

welcome_test.failed_description: Could not generate the welcome card. Please try again.

goodbye_test.failed_description: Could not generate the goodbye card. Please try again.

confirm.not_owner_description: Only the person who ran this command can use these buttons.
confirm.timeout_description: The confirmation dialog has timed out. Please run the command again if needed.
confirm.kick_confirm_description:
Are you sure you want to kick {mention}?
**Reason:** {reason}
